---
title: "HADACA3 - filtering features"
author: "Florent Chuffart"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_document:
---

```{r, include=(FALSE)}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse=TRUE, comment="#>", fig.width=9, fig.height=6, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, results="verbatim")
options(knitr.duplicate.label = "allow")
```



```{r}
authorized_genes  = readRDS(authorized_genes_file)
authorized_probes = readRDS(authorized_probes_file)

for (i in 1:2) {
    tmp = readRDS(paste0(mixes_files[[i]]))
    if (domain=="pdac") {
      tmp$mix_rna = tmp$mix_rna[authorized_genes,]
      tmp$mix_met = tmp$mix_met[authorized_probes,]
    }
    mixes_files_split = strsplit(mixes_files[[i]],"/")[[1]]
    saveRDS(tmp, file = paste0(mixes_files_split[1],"/filtered", mixes_files_split[2]))
}
```



# Session Information

```{r, results="verbatim"}
sessionInfo()
```
